title: Services — Nexus Digital
hero_sub: Web, mobile, marketing, social media and automation — all your digital needs under one roof.
web_desc: We build fast-loading, conversion-focused websites that strengthen your online presence. We use Next.js, React and modern technologies.
mobile_desc: User-friendly, high-performance mobile apps for iOS and Android. Native experience with React Native.
marketing_desc: Measurable ad campaigns on Google Ads, Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram) and other platforms.
social_desc: We amplify your brand's voice. Creative content creation, community management and influencer partnerships.
auto_desc: Automate your business processes with n8n and other tools. Eliminate repetitive tasks, increase efficiency.
seo_desc: Rank higher on search engines. Technical SEO, content strategy and comprehensive analytics reporting.
cta_sub: Let's start with a free consultation.
